name: Internal container using a container image with cleartext cloud keys granting permission to access resources in other subscriptions
description: A container uses an image with cleartext cross-account access keys
conditions: has_cross_account_cloud_keys == true OR secrets ANY (type == 'cloud_key' AND cleartext == true AND cross_account_access == true)
remediation: Rebuild image without embedded keys. Use IAM roles for cross-account access.
